description_long: This information point is a modern exhibition booth or kiosk, featuring a clean, angular design with a combination of muted green, white, and blue panels. The main wall displays a large information board with graphics and text, accompanied by a mounted digital screen for interactive content. In front of the wall, there is a set of four wooden stools arranged around a small round table, providing a space for visitors to sit and engage. A reception counter with branding is positioned at the entrance, offering a clear point of contact for inquiries. The booth is carpeted, enhancing comfort and sound absorption, and the overall structure is enclosed on three sides, with one open side for easy access. The design emphasizes clarity, accessibility, and a professional appearance suitable for urban public spaces or trade shows.
description: A modern, enclosed information booth with a branded counter, digital display, and seating area, finished in muted green, white, and blue. Features include a large information wall, interactive screen, and a set of stools around a table.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main information wall, digital screen, seating area with stools, and the branded reception counter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the seating area, the reception counter, and partial visibility of the information wall and digital display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain exterior wall with minimal detailing and no visible signage or interactive features.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the solid exterior wall and the back of the reception counter, with no visible interactive elements.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features clean, flat panels in muted green and white, with a large, visually organized information board and a digital display. Branding is prominently displayed on the reception counter and wall, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on clarity and accessibility.
